attacking_style: Lacks decisive attacking punch even when given tactical opportunities. Shows reluctance or inability to exploit numerical advantages and isolated rivals.
team_tactics: Receives protected rider status from UAE Team Emirates but struggles to convert team support into results. Given opportunities to attack when rivals are isolated but fails to capitalize.
terrain_preference: Time trial specialist with top-5 capability on technical courses. Struggles on punchy accelerations and explosive climb finishes; better suited to steady tempo efforts.
vulnerability: Cannot follow sharp accelerations when GC rivals attack (dropped at 9km when pace surges). Fails to capitalize when handed tactical advantages with numerical superiority.
key_patterns: Dropped early when pace accelerates sharply on climbs (9km from finish, Paris-Nice 2023)
Strong time trialist but climbing punch insufficient for elite GC battle finishes (2 instances)
Given protected status and tactical opportunities but cannot convert advantages into gaps or results
form_trajectory: negative: Regressed from dangerous Tour GC form (2022) to being dropped early by rivals' accelerations (2023)
